name: govdata
description: Local MCP tools for U.S. government, FRED, and IPUMS extract APIs.

interface.longDescription: GovData bundles a local MCP server for raw passthrough access to Data.gov, Census, BLS, USDA, Commerce, Education, DOJ/FBI, Treasury, EIA, EPA, FCC, FDIC, FEC, FTC, FDA/openFDA, GSA, govinfo, Congress.gov, NASA, NIH RePORTER, NPS, NREL, Smithsonian, USGS, FRED, USAspending, Data USA, and IPUMS extract APIs.
defaultPrompt: Use the govdata MCP to find Census population estimates for California counties.
Use the govdata MCP to fetch BLS CPI time series data and cite the source.
Use the govdata MCP to search FRED for GDP series and fetch observations.
Use the govdata MCP to plan an IPUMS extract for ACS or CPS microdata.
